demonstrated_techniques: careful tissue handling to avoid bowel injury
verbal_cues: Do not cut the bowel - explicitly warned in red text overlay

anatomic_correlations.uterus: high density chair pad painted pink
anatomic_correlations.rectum: emergency mylar blankets with cotton batting

construction_steps: Create uterosacral ligaments with marked measurements
Paint uterus model and add level markings
Place sutures through fundus for retraction
Add adhesions using fiberfill and adhesive spray

educational_validation.outcomes: increased comfort level, rated as realistic and useful

learning_objectives: Develop skills for managing unexpected obliteration
Improve resident education in laparoscopic technique

frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing Novel Posterior Cul-de-sac Simulation Model with authors
Slide describing clinical problem and educational need
Laparoscopic view showing graspers dissecting adhesions around pink rectum model
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates careful traction and counter-traction technique

frame_analyses.description: Close-up view of adhesion dissection with white fiberfill material being carefully separated
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper tissue plane identification and gradual dissection

frame_analyses.description: Red text overlay warning 'DO NOT CUT THE BOWEL' prominently displayed

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an instructional video about a simulation model, not an FLS task performance. The content shows model construction steps and educational validation rather than standardized FLS task execution.
educational_value: High - provides detailed construction guide for affordable simulation model with proven educational outcomes
